2111020110222211012201112212121010020000001202122120 - ASI: 31

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  011 = 01 * 1
  110 = 1 * 10
  122 = 1 * 22
  202 = 20 * 2
  0001 = 00 * 01
  1221 = 122 * 1
  2000 = 20 * 00
  2101 = 21 * 01
  2222 = 22 * 22
  11020 = 110 * 20
  002000 = 00 * 2000
  110122 = 110 * 122
  122120 = 1221 * 20
  212101 = 21 * 2101
  0001202 = 0001 * 202
  0111221 = 011 * 1221
  1102222 = 110 * 2222
  2111020 = 21 * 11020
  212101002000 = 212101 * 002000
  0001202122120 = 0001202 * 122120
  1101220111221 = 110122 * 0111221
  21110201102222 = 2111020 * 1102222
  2121010020000001202122120 = 212101002000 * 0001202122120
  211102011022221101220111221 = 21110201102222 * 1101220111221
  2111020110222211012201112212121010020000001202122120 = 211102011022221101220111221 * 2121010020000001202122120
